title: MoreBlocks
description: Adds more variant blocks to minecraft.
body:
**MoreBlocks** is a mod designed to enhance building creativity by adding a wide variety of new block variations for builders to experiment with. The mod focuses on giving players more control over shaping their builds with half-blocks, stairs, and slabs, even for blocks that aren't traditionally versatile in vanilla Minecraft. Perfect for detailed construction, landscapes, and advanced design, this mod opens up endless possibilities.

![all blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ed6d7c3806e7a0b6a5b1772dff156db4d8ea082.png)

# Blocks: (some blocks may not exist in older versions)

![stairs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea118fc5d4ac37013533d7d5efe9097e7d0da3a1.png)

![slabs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b9468cd4a0c02c74cab4fe4fe0b61870b3ea429.png)

![other](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4402bfa98ca0f3ba5d1d35e5b83346d26b995b61.png)

![blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6085380ba74911b7d269d58696865965b00ea742.png)

Additional Features:
  - Seamless Integration:
    The new block variations blend perfectly with existing Minecraft blocks, maintaining the game's visual consistency while adding more depth to your 
  - Crafting Recipes:
    All new variations have logical crafting recipes, usually derived from their full-block counterparts, keeping the mod intuitive to use.
  - Customization:
  The mod comes with a built-in configuration option allowing players to toggle which blocks they want to enable or disable in their game.
  - Survival Friendly:
    All blocks are fully functional in both survival and creative modes, with recipes that align with standard survival progression.

# Installation

Install Forge.
- Download the mod.
- Navigate to your .minecraft folder.
- paste the mod on the mods folder.
- Play!
